working_baseline.name: E6_EXCLUDE_NEAR_PRIOR_DAY_DIRECTIONAL_EXTREME
working_baseline.rule: retain unavailable prior-day ATR rows or directional-extreme distance > 0.25 completed-D1 ATR

candidate_rules.P2_BOS_QUALITY_2_OF_3: BOS body fraction >= 0.60; directional close location >= 0.75; true range >= ATR14; require at least two
candidate_rules.P3_ENTRY_EXTENSION_LE_0_35R: absolute raw-entry to pivot distance / frozen initial risk <= 0.35
candidate_rules.R1_CLEAR_TO_TP1: nearest known directionally-ahead structural level clearance / frozen initial risk >= 1.25
candidate_rules.R2_CLEAR_TO_RUNNER: nearest known directionally-ahead structural level clearance / frozen initial risk >= 2.50

mechanism_classification.comparison: E6-kept available signals versus E6-rejected near-prior-day-extreme signals using isolated causal simulations, with unavailable rows reported separately
supported_requires: rejected expectancy at least 0.05R below kept expectancy
rejected stop-first rate at least 5 percentage points higher OR rejected mean MAE at least 0.10R higher

at least three of six adverse markers: MFE lower by 0.10R; TP1 hit lower by 5pp; TP2 hit lower by 3pp; first-15-minute MAE higher by 0.05R; first-30-minute MAE higher by 0.08R; structural clearance lower by 0.25R
kept-minus-rejected expectancy positive in at least two of three calendar years and two of three sessions
mechanism_classification.mixed: rejected expectancy is lower or at least three adverse markers are present, but all SUPPORTED requirements are not met

inference.familywise_method: joint market-date block max-t, one-sided incremental test versus E6

historical_gate.effect: expectancy >= E6 + 0.03R OR max drawdown <= 80% of E6 with expectancy >= E6 - 0.01R
historical_gate.cost: two-tick-each-side expectancy positive and no more than 0.02R below E6
historical_gate.years: all three years positive OR two positive and worst >= -3R
historical_gate.sequencing: all changed trades attributed and no overlapping positions

restrictions: no entry stop target partial breakeven or time-exit change
historical results may only nominate a fresh-OOS challenger
no Pine sizing or deployment authorization
